headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Allegion, Lowers Price Target to $161
summary: Barclays  analyst Julian Mitchell   maintains Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $165 to $161.

headline: Allegion PLC (ALLE) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth Amid Margin Pressures
summary: Allegion PLC (ALLE) reports robust revenue growth driven by the Americas segment, while facing challenges in international margins and earnings per share.

headline: Why Allegion (ALLE) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of security hardware provider Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) fell 7.1% in the afternoon session after the company reported first-quarter 2026 results that missed Wall Street's profit estimates.
